name: Seafood Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 unbaked pastry shell, regular size baking
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the pastry shell with double slices of cheese.
2. Cover the cheese with a layer of shrimp and a layer of crabmeat.
3. Beat together the eggs, whipping cream, flour, salt, pepper, and cayenne.
4. Combine this mixture with sherry and melted butter.
5. Pour the mixture over the seafood.
6. Refrigerate or freeze if desired.
7. To serve: Bake for 40 minutes at 375°F until light brown. Allow to stand for at least 20 minutes before serving.
